bird.name: Eastern chat-tanager
bird.summary: The eastern chat-tanager (Calyptophilus frugivorus) is a Near Threatened species of passerine bird belonging to the family Calyptophilidae.…

locations.name: 戈納夫島
locations.summary: 戈納夫島是海地的島嶼，位於太子港西北面的戈納夫灣，島嶼長60公里、闊15公里，面積743平方公里，是伊斯帕尼奧拉島附近面積最大的小島，島上最高點778米，2003年人口75,548，該島曾經是海盜的基地。 由于常年乱砍滥伐，戈纳夫岛上的植…

relations.subject: Eastern chat-tanager
relations.evidence: abbotti was found on Gonâve Island off the west coast of Haiti but is also believed to be extinct since the early 1980s; however, a lack of extensive surveys on the island means the subspecies potentially survives. In the Dominican Republic, the species inhabits dense undergrowth in montane forest, especially in ravines and along streams

relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Eastern chat-tanager
relations.evidence: abbottis habitat on Gonâve was semi-arid scrublands near sea level
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Eastern chat-tanager
relations.evidence: The main threats are logging and conversion of habitat to agriculture. It is considered rare to locally common, but " relatively little of the species' habitat lies within protected areas"
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
